context: Evaluates the agent's ability to open a guided interview with exactly one question, concrete options, and an open free-text path.

checklist.name: Single question
checklist.description: Exactly one question is asked in the opening turn, not several bundled together

checklist.name: 3-4 concrete options
checklist.description: The question offers 3 or 4 distinct, real options, not a false binary or an overloaded list

checklist.name: Options carry tradeoffs
checklist.description: Each option includes a short description of its implication or tradeoff, not just a bare label

checklist.name: Free-text path open
checklist.description: An 'other'/free-text path is explicitly available alongside the curated options
